mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (review_no, user_no, content) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userNo}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_no AS commentNo, c.review_no AS reviewNo, c.user_no AS userNo, c.content AS content, c.reg_date AS regDate, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_img AS userImg FROM comment c JOIN users u ON c.user_no = u.user_no WHERE c.review_no = #{reviewNo} ORDER BY c.reg_date ASC
